title: Clean up AI slop from UI kit: remove decorative em dashes and improve empty states
description:
Removed all decorative em dashes (—) from components.html UI kit and replaced with proper design patterns:

- Typography annotations: Changed 'Heading 1 — text-4xl' to styled spans with proper sizing info
- Status messages: Changed 'Offline — connection lost' to 'Offline: connection lost'
- Table/station names: Changed 'Table 2 — Interview' to 'Table 2 (Interview)' with proper styling
- Empty states: Replaced decorative '—' symbols with proper empty state icons (X in circle) and descriptive text like 'Empty' or 'No clients'
- Descriptions: Changed 'Mobile (375px) — Staff processes' to 'Mobile (375px) for staff to process'
- Code annotations: Improved spacing and styling for code examples

All decorative dashes removed except legitimate ones in CSS comments and page title. UI kit now has clean, professional appearance without placeholder 'AI slop'.

title: BD-001: Initialize Laravel 12 project with Svelte 5 + Inertia.js + TailwindCSS + DaisyUI
description: Foundation. Tech stack per docs. Laravel 12, Svelte 5 (@inertiajs/svelte), TailwindCSS 4, DaisyUI 5. Acceptance: composer create-project laravel/laravel; Inertia server + Svelte 5 + Vite; Tailwind 4 + Inter font; DaisyUI 5 via @plugin in app.css; FlexiQueue theme per 07-UI-UX-SPECS; test page / renders Svelte via Inertia; npm run dev and php artisan serve work.
